rounds.plan_think: The document seems to be an administrative case based on the context of工伤保险资格认定 (work injury insurance qualification determination) and the involvement of a human resources and social security bureau. I will inspect the section that provides more details on the case background to confirm the type of the case.

info.summary: 再审申请人封某因与被申请人巴音郭楞蒙古自治州人力资源和社会保障局、和静县某建筑安装有限公司工伤保险资格认定一案，不服新疆维吾尔自治区巴音郭楞蒙古自治州中级人民法院作出的行政判决，向本院申请再审。
info.text: 再审申请人封某因与被申请人巴音郭楞蒙古自治州人力资源和社会保障局（以下简称巴州人社局）、和静县某建筑安装有限公司（以下简称某建筑公司）工伤保险资格认定一案，不服新疆维吾尔自治区巴音郭楞蒙古自治州中级人民法院作出的（2023）新28行终46号行政判决，向本院申请再审。本院受理后依法组成合议庭审查了本案，现已审查完毕。

rounds.extract_think: The anchor chunk clearly indicates that the case involves a dispute over work injury insurance qualification determination between an individual and the Human Resources and Social Security Bureau, which is reviewed by an administrative court. This confirms that the case is an administrative case. No further information is needed from this document to classify the case type.
